description: Phase3-B25c: Removed Content-Length from qwen3_sse template + removed 50ms usleep. Root cause from #370 HAR: browser received 200 OK + 401 bytes completely, but EventStream showed ZERO parsed events. Content-Length forces browser to treat SSE as completed response instead of stream.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: CRITICAL: Does removing Content-Length from SSE response fix the perpetual spinner? Check: (1) Does warning text appear in the chat? (2) Does EventStream tab show events now? (3) Any console errors? Previous 6 tests all showed STUCK_ON_THINKING.
services.notes: Phase3-B25c changes: (a) SSE templates no longer get Content-Length header auto-added by recalculate_content_length(), (b) 50ms usleep removed from visible_tls_session.cpp, (c) qwen3_sse DB template updated to remove Content-Length line, (d) v0 diagnostic logging added. Deployed at 18:19 KST.

notes: 7th attempt at qwen3. If Content-Length removal doesn't help, need to compare with real qwen3 SSE format (#372). The browser DID receive data — it's a format/parsing issue, not delivery.
